channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-20
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. In the **scienceverse/metacheck** repository, Lakens addressed a critical crash issue and added new functionality to load paper databases, enhancing the tool's reliability and capabilities. Meanwhile, **giladfeldman/docpluck** and **giladfeldman/escicheck** have also received updates, with improvements to table features and synchronization with the **escicheckapp** repository, respectively. Notably, these updates demonstrate the interconnectedness of our projects, with **escicheck** now aligned with **effectcheck** version 0.6.3. Additionally, **shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve** and **giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward** have seen revisions to their validation notes and the addition of a Chrome Webstore link, respectively, showcasing the community's commitment to refinement and accessibility. These advancements highlight the collaborative spirit and dedication to open-source research tools that define our community.

117 commits across 7 active repositories this week.

New releases: metacheck v0.1.0-beta

Dormant repos revived: output-it-forward

Most active:

regcheck37 commits
coarse31 commits
docpluck26 commits
metacheck20 commits
escicheck1 commits

item.title: regcheck: 2 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

Work was done on the 'staging' branch, where the "qwen" was improved, and then re-added. The commit message "push for redeploy" suggests that changes were pushed for redeployment. Additionally, efforts were made to "hunt down" an OSF bug, indicating that bug-fixing work was done in this area. The logging functionality was also improved, as stated in the commit message "improve logging".

2 commit(s) today:

  • f775856 [staging] improve qwen — Jamie Cummins
  • 724d020 [staging] re-add qwen! — Jamie Cummins
  • 89a1470 [staging] push for redeploy — Jamie Cummins
  • baebc81 [staging] hunting down osf bug — Jamie Cummins
  • 2f5eaaa [staging] improve logging — Jamie Cummins
  • 7fb80fe [staging] improve error message — Jamie Cummins
  • a2f7302 [staging] fix osf bug — Jamie Cummins
  • d2089d5 [staging] remove groq endpoints — Jamie Cummins
  • 51b9ba6 [staging] harden json handling — Jamie Cummins
  • 6cdde08 [staging] fix oss bug — Jamie Cummins
  • 1fd2de7 [staging] use more efficient storage — Jamie Cummins
  • 4b7a527 [staging] patch oss SDK handler — Jamie Cummins
  • e514303 [staging] fix oss handling bug — Jamie Cummins
  • 599489b [staging] harden qwen handling — Jamie Cummins
  • 8e7e452 [staging] improve embedding efficiency, purge dead code — Jamie Cummins
  • 88e039c [staging] replace deprecated llama — Jamie Cummins
  • 80dcf34 [staging] harden osf handling again — Jamie Cummins
  • d3471fe [staging] change llama model to best available — Jamie Cummins
  • 65d8ba6 [staging] production hardening - staging test — Jamie Cummins
  • 9c4cd96 [staging] prod preparation: phase 1 + 2 — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →

item.title: output-it-forward: activity update
item.description:
giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward

The `main` branch was updated with a commit that added a Chrome Webstore link for OIF, as stated in the commit message "Add Chrome Webstore link for OIF". No other branches were worked on in this set of commits. This change specifically added a link, with no other features or fixes mentioned in the provided commit messages. The commit message does not mention any other modifications or additions to the repository. The work was limited to a single commit on the `main` branch, with no other branches or changes noted. The repository now includes a Chrome Webstore link for OIF, as a result of this single commit.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
